name: Toy Picnic Basket Playset 32pc - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
The 32-Piece Toy Picnic Basket Playset from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia makes a perfect gift for your creative child. This picnic basket playset includes everything they need for play, including utensils, plates, play food and more. Great for ages three and up, this playset encourages imaginative play that your child can enjoy alone or with friends.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
